Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is immediately followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities that are eventually followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurs before SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of variants in which SW-Initial Reviewer Selection appears without any subsequent SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not occur

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities that lead to a revision outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is followed by at least one reviewer decline (SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is part of a variant ending in SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences that are followed within 7 days by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases that eventually reach SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities occurring after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Number of variants where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is directly succeeded by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection events that are not followed by any reviewer agreement (SW-Reviewer Agreed) within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to the total number of reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that result in more than three reviewer assignment attempts (SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection initiates a reviewer selection cycle that ends in Assign a Different Editor
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'Assign a Different Editor' occurs
